features: 2 IN 1: Overindulge yourself in mounds of our most indulgent lather, that can be used as both a body and hair wash, leaving your skin looking and feeling restored.
RESTORATIVE FRAGRANCE: Treat yourself with this indulgent shower gel bursting with scents of black pepper & cedarwood, enriched with our signature blend – a real burst of scent!
RICH LATHER: Imperial Leather Shower Gel transforms into clouds of rich, creamy lather for a decadent experience - leaving you feeling restored.
SKIN CARE: Imperial Leather shower gel is dermatologically tested & suitable for all skin types – body wash made with your skin in mind!
BULK BUY: This pack of 6 x bottles of shower gel is a great bulk buy for endless moments of indulgence.
description: Product Description A powerful fusion of sandal and cedarwood combined with the evergreen freshness of cypress and spicy crushed black peppercorns. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes.
